description: A magical realm where knowledge is power and ancient secrets shape the fate of villages and kingdoms.

millbrook_village.name: Millbrook Village
millbrook_village.description: A peaceful farming village known for its excellent library and skilled craftsmen.
features: The Great Library - Repository of local knowledge
Oakshield Smithy - Magical metalworking
Millbrook Stream - Powers the village mill
The Commons - Village gathering place
millbrook_village.culture: Values knowledge, craftsmanship, and community cooperation

ethereal_academy.name: Academy of Ethereal Arts
ethereal_academy.description: A floating citadel where scholars study the mystical arts and preserve ancient knowledge.
features: The Luminous Library - Magical texts and scrolls
Floating Gardens - Herbalism and alchemy
The Observatory - Astronomical studies
The Vault - Dangerous or powerful knowledge
ethereal_academy.access: By invitation only or magical transport

whispering_woods.name: The Whispering Woods
whispering_woods.description: An ancient forest where the trees themselves hold memories and knowledge.
features: Memory Trees - Store echoes of past events
The Clearing of Truths - Reveals hidden knowledge
Ancient Paths - Shift based on traveler's need
The Grove of Silence - Perfect for meditation
dangers: Lost scholars who became part of the forest

crystal_caverns.name: The Crystal Caverns of Remembrance
crystal_caverns.description: Natural caves filled with memory crystals that preserve ancient history.
features: The Hall of Echoes - Crystalline formations
The Pool of Reflection - Scrying waters
The Archive Chamber - Stored memories
The Nexus - Connection to other realms
crystal_caverns.guardians: Ancient constructs that protect the memories
crystal_caverns.treasure: The Chronicle of Seasons - Legendary magical text

shadowmere_ruins.name: Shadowmere Ruins
shadowmere_ruins.description: Ruins of a civilization that fell due to the misuse of forbidden knowledge.
features: The Broken Tower - Former seat of power
The Sunken Library - Partially flooded archives
The Maze of Regrets - Twisted corridors
The Sanctum - Where the final ritual failed
shadowmere_ruins.current_state: Overrun by creatures born from corrupted knowledge
shadowmere_ruins.warnings: Many scholars have been lost exploring these ruins

geography.terrain: Rolling hills, forests, rivers, and scattered ruins
magical_features: Ley lines that enhance magical abilities
Seasonal shifts that affect magic strength

common_routes: The Scholar's Road - Connects villages to the Academy
The Whispering Path - Through the enchanted forest
The Crystal Route - To the underground caverns
transportation: Walking and horseback for common folk
